title: The Founding Drop
location_hint: Trail off Butler Road, Central Jersey
theme: The origin story of the Khan Geocaching Bureau — the inaugural cache placed by its founding members on the day the agency was born

content_brief.tone_notes: Spy-agency dossier style, warm and kid-friendly. Use official-sounding bureau language (classified, field agents, headquarters, mission briefing) but keep it playful and age-appropriate. This is the very first KGB cache ever — the founding moment. Convey real excitement: the Bureau has been officially established, agents have been recruited, and this trail in Central Jersey is where it all began. More missions and more caches are coming. KGB stands for Khan Geocaching Bureau.
must_include: Introduce the KGB as the Khan Geocaching Bureau — what it is and why it was founded
Establish this as Cache #001, the very first cache ever placed by the agency
Tell the story of how the founding members started the KGB — make it fun and dramatic for kids
Reference this beautiful trail in Central Jersey as the birthplace of the KGB
Build excitement that this is only the beginning — more caches and missions are coming
A call-to-action for the finder to officially become a KGB field agent by signing the log
Instructions to rehide the cache exactly as found
must_avoid: Exact street address or precise GPS coordinates in narrative text
Any content that is scary, violent, or not suitable for young children
References to the Soviet spy agency
